title: Fix the retry count off-by-one
description: A retry utility runs one fewer attempt than requested, so one test fails. Fix src/retry.js so the whole suite passes, without modifying any test file.
prompt: The test suite for `src/retry.js` has a failing test: `retry()` makes one fewer attempt than it was asked for. Fix `src/retry.js` so the whole suite passes. Do not modify any test file.

judge.rubric: Was the change minimal and scoped to the loop bound (the off-by-one), rather than a rewrite of retry()?
Were all test files left unmodified, as the prompt required?
